title: Tender Turkish Cheese Su Boregi
description: A savory and juicy Turkish dish featuring cheese and brandy, grilled to perfection using a yakimono grill, suitable for ovo-vegetarian diets.
instructions: Preheat the yakimono grill to medium heat.
In a large bowl, mix together the feta cheese, ricotta cheese, and brandy until well combined.
In a separate bowl, whisk the eggs and season with salt and black pepper.
Add the egg mixture to the cheese mixture and stir until smooth.
Unroll the phyllo dough and cut it into 4 equal pieces.
Place a quarter of the cheese mixture onto the center of each phyllo piece.
Brush the edges of the phyllo with melted butter.
Fold the phyllo into triangles and press the edges to seal.
Grill the su boregi for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
